subtitle: The 6-kilometre Pattaya-adjacent strip where a wall of high-rise condos meets the Gulf of Thailand's busiest watersports beach.
spike_statement: A straight 6-kilometre beachfront in Bang Lamung, 3 km south of Pattaya, where a wall of high-rise condominiums fronts the Gulf's busiest jet-ski strip.

levers.photo_tone: flat Gulf-of-Thailand blue against pale quartz sand, the condo skyline as a hard grey edge behind the palms
